note: Real Alphabet Inc. DEF 14A excerpt, verbatim prose from SEC EDGAR. No pre-parsing — executor must identify nodes, board/executive rosters, and committee memberships from narrative text.

entries.description: Verbatim prose excerpt covering the Directors, Executive Officers, Board Leadership Structure, and Board Committees sections of Alphabet's 2024 Proxy Statement. 10 directors + 4 non-CEO executive officers + 4 standing committees with chair-and-member composition. Intentionally unstructured: no pre-parsed tree, no explicit edge list, and no inferred reporting relationships beyond the rosters stated in the filing.
